positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a stylized crescent moon nestled within a constellation of vibrant, interconnected lines and abstract stellar shapes. The design should utilize deep indigo blues, luminous celestial golds, and striking teal accents, set against a crisp, pure white background. The composition must be perfectly centralized, allowing the main motif to stand out with clean, strong silhouettes and high contrast, optimized for repeat fabric pattern application. Style should be a fusion of Art Deco and contemporary vector line art, with a sense of cosmic mystery and elegant symmetry. Use negative space dramatically to enhance readability and print quality.
negative: blurry, grainy, low detail, bad anatomy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, smudge, clutter, asymmetrical, realism, photographic, cluttered background
